uk.ENFORCER_DESCRIPTION:
The Enforcer is a defensive juggernaut who can take and give a beating.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Riot Shotgun can pierce through many enemies at once.

< ! > Batting away enemies with Shield Bash guarantees you will keep enemies at a safe range.

< ! > Use Tear Gas to weaken large crowds of enemies, then get in close and crush them.

< ! > When you can, use Protect and Serve against walls to prevent enemies from flanking you.
uk.ENFORCER_LORE:
<style=cMono>"You don't have to do this."</style>

The words echoed in his head, yet he pushed forward. The pod was only a few steps away — he had a chance to leave — but something in his core kept him moving. He didn't know what it was, but he didn't question it. It was a natural force: the same force that always drove him to follow orders.

This time, however, it didn't seem so natural. There were no orders. The heavy trigger and its rhythmic thunder were his — and his alone.
uk.ENFORCER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..and so he left, unsure of his title as protector.
uk.ENFORCER_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..and so he vanished, the planet's minorities finally at peace.
uk.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_SHOTGUN_DESCRIPTION: Fire a short-range blast that <style=cIsUtility>pierces</style> for <style=cIsDamage>6x60% damage.</style>
uk.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_SUPERSHOTGUN_DESCRIPTIO:
Fire up to 2 shotgun blasts for <style=cIsDamage>8x80% damage</style>.
While using <style=cIsUtility>Protect and Serve</style>, fire <style=cIsDamage>both barrels at once.</style>
uk.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_RIFLE_DESCRIPTION:
Unload a barrage of bullets for <style=cIsDamage>130% damage</style>.
While using <style=cIsUtility>Protect and Serve</style>, has <style=cIsDamage>increased accuracy</style>, but <style=cIsHealth>slower movement speed</style>.
uk.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_HAMMER_DESCRIPTION:
Swing your hammer for <style=cIsDamage>500% damage</style>.
While using Protect and Serve, swing in a <style=cIsUtility>larger area</style>, for <style=cIsDamage>1000% damage</style> instead.
uk.KEYWORD_SPRINTBASH:
<style=cKeywordName>Shoulder Bash</style><style=cSub><style=cIsDamage>Stunning.</style> A short charge that deals <style=cIsDamage>450% damage</style>.
Hitting <style=cIsDamage>heavier enemies</style> deals <style=cIsDamage>700% damage</style>.
uk.ENFORCER_SECONDARY_BASH_DESCRIPTION:
<style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. Knock back enemies for <style=cIsDamage>350% damage</style> and <style=cIsUtility>deflect projectiles</style>.
While <style=cIsUtility>sprinting</style>, perform a <style=cIsDamage>Shoulder Bash</style> instead.
uk.KEYWORD_BLINDED: <style=cKeywordName>Impaired</style><style=cSub>Reduce movement speed by <style=cIsDamage>75%</style>, attack speed by <style=cIsDamage>25%</style> and armor by <style=cIsDamage>30</style>.</style></style>
uk.ENFORCER_UTILITY_TEARGAS_DESCRIPTION: Toss a grenade that covers an area in <style=cIsDamage>Impairing</style> gas.
uk.ENFORCER_UTILITY_STUNGRENADE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. Launch a grenade that concusses enemies for <style=cIsDamage>540% damage</style>. Hold up to 3.
uk.ENFORCER_UTILITY_TEARGASSCEPTER_DESCRIPT: Toss a grenade that covers an area in <style=cIsDamage>Impairing</style> gas, choking enemies for <style=cIsDamage>200% damage per second</style>.
uk.ENFORCER_UTILITY_SHOCKGRENADE_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsDamage>Shocking</style>. Launch a grenade that electrocutes enemies for <style=cIsDamage>720% damage</style>. Hold up to 3.
uk.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDUP_DESCRIPTION: Take a defensive stance, <style=cIsUtility>blocking all damage from the front</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Enhances primary fire</style>, but <style=cIsHealth>prevents sprinting and jumping</style>.
uk.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDDOWN_DESCRIPTION: Take a defensive stance, <style=cIsUtility>blocking all damage from the front</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Increases attack speed</style>, but <style=cIsHealth>prevents sprinting and jumping</style>.
uk.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDON_DESCRIPTION: Take a defensive stance, <style=cIsUtility>projecting an Energy Shield in front of you</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Increases your rate of fire</style>, but <style=cIsUtility>prevents sprinting and jumping</style>.
uk.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDOFF_DESCRIPTION: Take a defensive stance, <style=cIsUtility>projecting an Energy Shield in front of you</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Increases your rate of fire</style>, but <style=cIsUtility>prevents sprinting and jumping</style>.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_CHARACTERUNLOCKABLE: Kill a Magma Worm, a Wandering Vagrant and a Stone Titan in a single run.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_A: As Enforcer, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_GRANDMASTERYUNLOCKA:
As Enforcer, beat the game or obliterate on Typhoon or Eclipse.
<color=#8888>(Counts any difficulty Typhoon or higher)</color>
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_DOOMUNLOCKABLE_ACHI: As Enforcer, kill 20 imps in a single run.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_STUNGRENADEUNLOCKAB: As Enforcer, have 20 enemies under the effects of Tear Gas at once.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_ROBITUNLOCKABLE_ACH: As Enforcer, fall and be brought back to life.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_NEMESISSKINUNLOCKAB: As Enforcer, stabilize the Cell in the Void Fields.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_DOOMINTERNALUNLOCKA: As Enforcer, kill 10 imp overlords in a single run.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_CLASSICUNLOCKABLE_A: As Enforcer, show off your dance moves.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_DESPERADOUNLOCKABLE: As Enforcer, Defeat the unique guardian of Gilded Coast by pushing it off the edge of the map.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_BUNGUSUNLOCKABLE_AC: As Enforcer, become one with the Bungus.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_STORMTROOPERUNLOCKA: As Enforcer, defeat an elite Solus Control Unit.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_FROGUNLOCKABLE_ACHI: As Enforcer, make a friend on the moon.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_STEVEUNLOCKABLE_ACH: As Enforcer, block an attack with your shield.
uk.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_SHOTGUN_NAME_UPGRADE_DE: <style=cIsUtility>+5%</style> damage, <style=cIsUtility>+10%</style> bullet thickness, and <style=cIsUtility>+0.1</style> bullet spread
uk.NEMFORCER_DESCRIPTION:
Nemesis Enforcer is an incarnation of valiance and strength, a supernatural kind who is nobody to take lightly.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Golden Hammer can hit many enemies at once.

< ! > Use Dominance from high up to perform a devastating slam.

< ! > Strafing with Golden Minigun is key to taking down powerful bosses.

< ! > Shields are for pussies.
uk.NEMFORCER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..and so he left, with newfound might to honor.
uk.NEMFORCER_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..and so he returned, infallible bastion truly immortalized.
uk.ENFORCER_EVENT_NEMFORCERBOSS_START: An unnatural force emanates from the void... </style>
uk.NEMFORCER_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Enforcer gains <style=cIsHealing>bonus health regen</style>, based on his current <style=cIsHealth>missing health</style>, up to <style=cIsHealth>2.5% max health</style>.
uk.NEMFORCER_PASSIVE_REWORK_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Enforcer regenerates <style=cIsHealing>2%</style> of his <style=cIsHealing>maximum health</style> over 3s when striking enemies with <style=cIsDamage>melee attacks</style>.
uk.NEMFORCER_PRIMARY_MINIGUN_DESCRIPTION: Rev up and fire a hail of bullets dealing <style=cIsDamage>65% damage</style> per bullet. <style=cIsUtility>Slows your movement while shooting.</style>
uk.KEYWORD_SLAM: <style=cKeywordName>Downward Slam</style><style=cIsDamage>Stunning.</style> Viciously <style=cIsHealth>crash down</style> with your hammer, dealing <style=cIsDamage>300%-2500% damage</style> and dealing an extra <style=cIsDamage>30%</style> of that on impact. <style=cIsUtility>Impact radius scales with speed.</style>
uk.NEMFORCER_SECONDARY_BASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Charge up</style>, then lunge forward and unleash a <style=cIsDamage>rising uppercut</style> for <style=cIsDamage>450%-2500% damage</style>. Use while <style=cIsUtility>falling and looking down</style> to perform a <style=cIsUtility>Downward Slam</style> instead.
uk.NEMFORCER_SECONDARY_SLAM_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning.</style> While in minigun stance, violently <style=cIsHealth>slam</style> down your hammer, dealing <style=cIsDamage>600% damage</style> and <style=cIsDamage>knocking back</style> enemies hit. <style=cIsUtility>Explodes projectiles.</style>
uk.NEMFORCER_UTILITY_GAS_DESCRIPTION: Throw a grenade that explodes into a cloud of <style=cIsUtility>corrosive gas</style> that <style=cIsUtility>slows</style> and deals <style=cIsDamage>200% damage per second</style> and lasts for <style=cIsDamage>16 seconds</style>.
uk.NEMFORCER_UTILITY_JUMP_DESCRIPTION: Jump into the air, then slam down for <style=cIsDamage>3200% damage</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Deals reduced damage outside the center of the impact.</style>
uk.KEYWORD_GRAPPLE: <style=cKeywordName>Grappling</style><style=cSub>Applies <style=cIsDamage>stun</style> and attempts to <style=cIsUtility>grab</style> a nearby enemy.
uk.NEMFORCER_UTILITY_CRASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Grappling.</style> Jump into the air, then slam down for <style=cIsDamage>2400% damage</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Deals reduced damage outside the center of the impact.</style>
uk.NEMFORCER_SPECIAL_MINIGUNUP_DESCRIPTION: Take an offensive stance, <style=cIsDamage>readying your minigun</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Prevents sprinting</style>.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_NEMESIS2UNLOCKABLE_: As Enforcer, on monsoon or higher, stabilize the Void Fields and defeat Enforcer's Vestige.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_NEMFORCER_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_: As Nemesis Enforcer, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon.
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_NEMFORCER_TYPHOONUNLOCKABLE_:
As Nemesis Enforcer, beat the game or obliterate on Typhoon or Eclipse.
<color=#8888>(Counts any difficulty Typhoon or higher)</color>
uk.ACHIEVEMENT_NEMFORCER_DOMINANCEUNLOCKABL: As Nemesis Enforcer, destroy 5 projectiles at once with Dominance.
